title: Michelin awards top three-key rating to Amsterdam hotel; 17 Dutch hotels honored
title_zh: 米其林授予阿姆斯特丹酒店三项顶级评级；17 家荷兰酒店获此殊荣
description: Michelinhas unveiled its first-ever hotel awards, honoring seventeen hotels across the Netherland
description_zh: 米其林餐厅首次公布酒店奖项，表彰荷兰 17 家酒店

title: Dutch student loan interest rises for former students, drops for current borrowers
title_zh: 荷兰学生贷款利息对往届学生上涨，对当前借款人下降
description: Former Dutch students will face slightly higher interest rates on their student loans over the next five years, the Dienst Uitvoering Onderwijs (DUO) announced.
description_zh: 荷兰学生贷款部门 (DUO) 宣布，未来五年，荷兰前学生的学生贷款利率将略有上升。

title: Dutch Cabinet plans evacuation of severely ill Gaza children by early November
title_zh: 荷兰内阁计划于11月初撤离加沙重病儿童
description: The Dutch Cabinet expects that the first possible opportunity toevacuate sick or wound
description_zh: 荷兰内阁希望尽快撤离伤病员

title: Man hospitalized after early-morning attack in Noord-Brabant; police hunt suspect
title_zh: 北布拉班特省凌晨发生袭击事件，男子住院治疗；警方追捕嫌疑人
description: A man was hospitalized with unknown injuries early Saturday after an attack in a residential neighborhood in Noord-Brabant, police said.
description_zh: 警方称，周六凌晨，一名男子在北布拉班特省一处居民区遭遇袭击，伤势不明，被送往医院。

title: Dutch navy escorts damaged Russian submarine through North Sea
title_zh: 荷兰海军护送受损俄罗斯潜艇穿越北海
description: The Dutch Navy escorted a damaged Russian submarine, the Novorossiysk, and its supporting tugboat, the Yakov Grebelskiy, through the North Sea on Thursday, the Ministry of Defense
description_zh: 荷兰国防部表示，荷兰海军周四护送受损的俄罗斯潜艇“新罗西斯克”号及其支援拖船“雅科夫·格雷贝尔斯基”号穿越北海

title: GroenLinks-PvdA’s Timmermans eyes premiership if left forms government
title_zh: GroenLinks-PvdA 的蒂默曼斯希望如果左派组建政府，他将担任总理
description: Frans Timmermans, GroenLinks-PvdA faction leader, said he prefers to become prime minister if his party joins a coalition after the elections.
description_zh: 绿色左翼-人民党派系领导人弗朗斯·蒂默曼斯表示，如果他的政党在选举后加入联合政府，他愿意担任总理。

title: Police arrest dozens as anti-war activists block Rotterdam port rail line
title_zh: 反战人士封锁鹿特丹港口铁路线，警方逮捕数十人
description: Police used force Saturday to remove hundreds of climate and anti-war protesters who blocked parts of the Rotterdam port’s main freight railway for hours.
description_zh: 周六，警方动用武力驱散了数百名气候和反战抗议者，这些抗议者阻塞了鹿特丹港主要货运铁路部分路段长达数小时。

title: Racism in Dutch youth football far more widespread than reported, players say
title_zh: 球员称荷兰青少年足球中的种族主义比报道的要普遍得多
description: Racism in Dutch amateur football occurs far more frequently than official reports suggest, according to 36 youth players interviewed by
description_zh: 根据荷兰业余足球协会采访的 36 名年轻球员的说法，荷兰业余足球中种族歧视的发生频率远高于官方报告。

title: Police shoot dog after It attacks owners in Zoetermeer
title_zh: 祖特尔梅尔一狗袭击主人，警方开枪击毙它
description: Police in Zoetermeer shot and killed a dog that attacked its owners, leaving them seriously injured, authorities said.
description_zh: 当局称，祖特尔梅尔警方开枪打死了一只袭击其主人的狗，导致其主人受重伤。

title: Wilders suspends all campaign activities after being named in Belgian terror plot
title_zh: 威尔德斯因涉嫌参与比利时恐怖阴谋而暂停所有竞选活动
description: PVV leader Geert Wilders announced Friday that he is suspending all campaign activities after learning that suspects in a thwarted Belgian attack
description_zh: 自由党领导人吉尔特·威尔德斯周五宣布，在得知比利时袭击事件嫌疑人

title: Dutch 400-meter hurdles World Champion Femke Bol to move up to 800 meters
title_zh: 荷兰 400 米栏世界冠军 Femke Bol 将晋级 800 米
description: Dutch track star Femke Bol has decided to shift from the 400-meter hurdles to the 800 meters, a move she and her coach began considering immediately after the Paris Olympics.
description_zh: 荷兰田径明星费姆克·波尔决定从 400 米栏转到 800 米，巴黎奥运会后她和她的教练就开始考虑这一举措。

title: Geert Wilders cancels campaign appearances after Belgian threat
title_zh: 比利时威胁后，吉尔特·威尔德斯取消竞选活动
description: Geert Wilders has cancelled all his public appearances in the general campaign after the Dutch counter terrorism unit NCTV reportedly...
description_zh: 据报道，在荷兰反恐部门 NCTV 宣布... 后，吉尔特·威尔德斯取消了在大选中的所有公开露面。

title: Police arrest five in hunt for abducted Hoofddorp woman
title_zh: 警方逮捕五名被绑架的霍夫多普女子
description: The police have arrested five people in connection with the abduction of a 49-year-old woman from Hoofddorp, who is still...
description_zh: 警方逮捕了五名涉嫌绑架一名来自霍夫多普的 49 岁妇女的嫌疑人，该妇女目前仍被拘留......

title: Netherlands and Ukraine to co-produce drones as The Hague commits €200 million
title_zh: 海牙承诺投资 2 亿欧元，荷兰和乌克兰将联合生产无人机
description: The Netherlands and Ukraine have agreed to begin joint production of drones.
description_zh: 荷兰和乌克兰已同意开始联合生产无人机。

title: Femke Bol ends 400 metres hurdles career, switches to 800 metres
title_zh: 费姆克·波尔结束 400 米栏生涯，转战 800 米
description: The world 400 metres hurdles champion Femke Bol is switching events and plans to focus instead on the 800 metres...
description_zh: 世界 400 米栏冠军费姆克·波尔 (Femke Bol) 正在转换项目，计划将重点放在 800 米项目上……

title: Zaandam broker arrested for large-scale fraud targeting migrant workers
title_zh: 赞丹经纪人因针对移民工人实施大规模诈骗被捕
description: A 43-year-old real estate broker from Zaandam has been arrested for large-scale mortgage and document fraud that left migrant workers deeply in debt, according to
description_zh: 据悉，一名来自赞丹的 43 岁房地产经纪人因大规模抵押贷款和文件欺诈而被捕，导致移民工人深陷债务泥潭。

title: Explosions reported during Nunhems seed facility fire in Limburg
title_zh: 位于林堡的纽海姆种子工厂发生火灾，发生爆炸
description: A large fire broke out Friday evening at seed company Nunhems in Nunhem, and multiple explosions were reported, according to the Veiligheidsregio Limburg-Noord.
description_zh: 据林堡北区 (Veiligheidsregio Limburg-Noord) 报道，周五晚上，位于纽海姆 (Nunhem) 的种子公司纽海姆斯 (Nunhems) 发生大火，并发生多起爆炸。

title: Dutch government and Luxemburg consortium to invest €200 million in Groningen AI factory
title_zh: 荷兰政府和卢森堡财团将向格罗宁根人工智能工厂投资2亿欧元
description: Funding for an AI factory in Groningen has been secured.
description_zh: 格罗宁根人工智能工厂的资金已得到保障。

title: Five men arrested in abduction investigation of missing Hoofddorp woman
title_zh: 五名男子因调查失踪的霍夫多普女子绑架案而被捕
description: Police have arrested five men in connection with thedisappearance of a 49-year-old woman from Hoofddorp, who ha
description_zh: 警方逮捕了五名与一名来自霍夫多普的 49 岁女子失踪案有关的男子，该女子

title: Sharp decrease in bankruptcies in September compared to a year ago
title_zh: 9月份破产数量与去年同期相比大幅下降
description: Bankruptcies continued to decline in September, according to Statistics Netherlands.
description_zh: 荷兰统计局称，9月份破产数量继续下降。

title: Growth of rental market entirely dependent on housing construction incoming decade
title_zh: 未来十年租赁市场的增长完全取决于住房建设
description: The economic research firm SEO has published a government-commissioned report stating that many of the existing mid-range rental homes will be sold in the next ten years.
description_zh: 经济研究公司 SEO 发布了一份政府委托的报告，指出许多现有的中档出租房屋将在未来十年内出售。

title: New Google AI search feature launches in the Netherlands
title_zh: 谷歌人工智能搜索新功能在荷兰上线
description: Google added a new artificial intelligence (AI) search feature to its search engine in nearly 50 countries and regions on Wednesday, including the Netherlands.
description_zh: 谷歌周三在包括荷兰在内的近 50 个国家和地区的搜索引擎中增加了新的人工智能 (AI) 搜索功能。

title: Housing crisis dominates voters concerns in upcoming elections, survey shows
title_zh: 调查显示，住房危机是选民在即将举行的选举中最为关注的问题
description: Housing is the most important issue in the upcoming elections for voters.
description_zh: 住房是即将举行的选举中选民最关心的问题。

title: Real-life inspiration for Netflix crime show accused of trafficking 540 kilos of cocaine
title_zh: Netflix 犯罪剧《被控贩卖 540 公斤可卡因》的现实生活灵感
description: Janus van W., 63, is suspected of trafficking 540 kilos of cocaine, a court hearing in the Den Bosch court heard on Friday.
description_zh: 周五，斯海尔托亨博斯法院听取了 63 岁的 Janus van W. 涉嫌贩卖 540 公斤可卡因的案件。

title: Police end investigation into violent deaths of mother, child in Terneuzen; No arrests
title_zh: 警方结束对泰尔讷曾母子暴力死亡事件的调查；无人被捕
description: Thepolicehave almost completed their investigation into the deaths of a 29-year-ol
description_zh: 警方几乎完成了对一名 29 岁男子死亡的调查

title: Minister urges Radboud to press charges over assistant professor’s anti-Israel tweets
title_zh: 部长敦促拉德布德对助理教授的反以色列推文提出指控
description: Caretaker Education Minister Gouke Moes has urged Radboud University to press charges against their assistant professor of geography, Dr Harry G.
description_zh: 看守教育部长 Gouke Moes 敦促拉德堡德大学对其地理学助理教授 Harry G 博士提出指控。

title: Entrepreneurs file emergency lawsuit to halt Port of Rotterdam strike
title_zh: 企业家提起紧急诉讼以阻止鹿特丹港罢工
description: A group of entrepreneurs is filing an emergency lawsuit on Friday against the FNV trade union over the strike by dock workers in the Port of Rotterdam, according to business organization Deltalinqs
description_zh: 据商业组织 Deltalinqs 称，一群企业家将于周五针对鹿特丹港码头工人罢工事件向 FNV 工会提起紧急诉讼

title: Tropical Storm Jerry prompts closures in Sint Maarten, Saba, and Sint-Eustatius
title_zh: 热带风暴杰瑞导致圣马丁岛、萨巴岛和圣尤斯特歇斯岛关闭
description: Residents of Sint Maarten, Sint Eustatius, and Saba are preparing for the arrival of Tropical Storm Jerry.
description_zh: 圣马丁岛、圣尤斯特歇斯岛和萨巴岛的居民正在为热带风暴杰瑞的到来做准备。

title: Motive remains unknown in Oosterhout shootings that left three dead in March
title_zh: 奥斯特豪特枪击案三月致三人死亡，凶手动机不明
description: The motive behind thedeadly shootings in Oosterhout, Noord-Brabant, on March 28 is still unc
description_zh: 3 月 28 日，北布拉班特省奥斯特豪特发生的致命枪击案的动机仍不清楚

title: Almelo, Purmerend, and Bergen op Zoom among stations targeted for safety upgrades
title_zh: 阿尔默洛、皮尔默伦德和贝尔亨奥普佐姆等车站将进行安全升级
description: Work will begin later this year to improve safety at three train stations where passengers most often report feeling unsafe.
description_zh: 今年晚些时候，我们将开始对三个火车站进行安全改善工作，因为乘客们经常报告这些火车站存在不安全感。

title: Geert Wilders “might be” on Belgian drone attack hit list: VTM
title_zh: 吉尔特·威尔德斯“可能”在比利时无人机袭击名单上：VTM
description: Dutch far-right leader Geert Wilders pulled out of a radio election debate on Friday after a Belgian broadcaster suggested he...
description_zh: 荷兰极右翼领导人吉尔特·威尔德斯 (Geert Wilders) 周五退出了一场电台选举辩论，此前一位比利时广播公司暗示他......

title: Wilders reportedly on Belgian terror cell's target list; Pulls out of election debate
title_zh: 据报道，威尔德斯被列入比利时恐怖组织的目标名单；他退出选举辩论
description: Geert Wilders is reportedly on the target list of a terrorist cell arrested in Belgium on Thursday.
description_zh: 据报道，周四在比利时被捕的恐怖分子团伙的目标名单上就有吉尔特·威尔德斯。

title: Podcast: The Gulf of Dick Advocaat Edition
title_zh: 播客：迪克·艾德沃卡特海湾版
description: Want to support the DutchNews podcast and keep up our stocks of stroopwafels and orange tompouces? Click here to become...
description_zh: 想要支持 DutchNews 播客并持续供应我们的荷兰焦糖华夫饼和橙子番茄酱吗？点击此处成为……

title: Man found dead after Amsterdam apartment fire took his own life; 17 homes uinhabitable
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹公寓火灾致一名男子死亡；17 栋房屋无法居住
description: The manfound dead after a fire in an apartment buildingin
description_zh: 一名男子在公寓楼发生火灾后被发现死亡

title: Car of missing Hoofddorp woman found as police fear kidnapping
title_zh: 霍夫多普失踪女子的汽车被发现，警方担心遭绑架
description: Police say the car belonging to a 49-year-old woman from Hoofddorp who vanished on Wednesday morning has been found in...
description_zh: 警方称，周三早上失踪的一名 49 岁霍夫多普女子的汽车已被找到......

title: Police release photo of missing Hoofddorp woman feared kidnapped after finding her car
title_zh: 警方公布霍夫多普失踪女子的照片，发现其汽车后担心遭绑架
description: Police have found the car belonging to a 49-year-old woman from Hoofddorp who has been missing since Wednesday.
description_zh: 警方找到了这辆汽车，车主是一名来自霍夫多普的 49 岁女子，她自周三失踪。

title: British airmen finally laid to rest in Friesland after 82 years
title_zh: 82年后，英国飞行员终于在弗里斯兰安息
description: Three British airmen whose plane was shot down over the IJsselmeer in 1943 have been reburied with full military honours...
description_zh: 1943 年，三名英国飞行员的飞机在艾瑟尔湖上空被击落，他们以最高军事荣誉被重新安葬……

title: How do Dutch political parties aim to boost spending on defence?
title_zh: 荷兰政党如何增加国防开支？
description: The government’s macro-economic policy unit CPB has completed its analysis of 10 party political programmes ahead of the general election...
description_zh: 政府的宏观经济政策部门 CPB 已完成对大选前 10 个政党政治纲领的分析......

title: Beverwijk alderman dismissed after reports of verbally inappropriate behavior
title_zh: 贝弗维克市议员因言语不当行为被举报而被解雇
description: Former parliamentarian Nevin Özütok was dismissed as alderman in Beverwijk on Thursday. Civil servants had complained that she had been guilty of verbally inappropriate behavior.
description_zh: 前议员内文·奥祖托克（Nevin Özütok）周四被解除贝弗维克市议员职务。公务员们曾抱怨她言语不当。

title: More women earning their own income, but improvement has leveled off
title_zh: 更多女性自主创业，但进步已趋于平稳
description: The number of women in the Netherlands earning their own income is rising, but the pace of improvement has stalled recently, data from Statistics Netherlands (CBS)
description_zh: 荷兰统计局 (CBS) 的数据显示，荷兰自主赚取收入的女性数量正在增加，但近期改善速度有所停滞

title: Most political parties want to scrap plans for cutting healthcare deductible to €165
title_zh: 大多数政党希望取消将医疗保健自付额削减至 165 欧元的计划
description: Most political parties want to reverse plans announced by the Schoof I Cabinet to
description_zh: 大多数政党希望推翻 Schoof I 内阁宣布的计划，

title: Landlord who rents to “working Dutch women only” faces fine
title_zh: 房东只将房屋出租给“荷兰在职女性”将面临罚款
description: Amsterdam housing officials have warned a city landlord that he faces a fine of up to €10,000 for discrimination if...
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹住房官员警告一名城市房东，如果出现歧视行为，他将面临最高 10,000 欧元的罚款……

title: “Cutting foreign student numbers will hit Dutch economy hard”
title_zh: “削减留学生数量将严重打击荷兰经济”
description: Limiting the number of international students coming to the Netherlands for a degree course could cost the Dutch economy up...
description_zh: 限制来荷兰攻读学位课程的国际学生数量可能会给荷兰经济造成巨大损失……

title: Over half in the Netherlands impacted by housing shortage stress
title_zh: 荷兰超过一半的人受到住房短缺压力的影响
description: Stress caused by the housing shortage has affected 52 percent of Netherlands residents, either directly or with someone in their immediate environment.
description_zh: 住房短缺造成的压力已经影响了 52% 的荷兰居民，他们要么直接受到影响，要么直接影响到周围的人。

title: GroenLinks-PvdA, VVD clash on mid-market rentals in election debate
title_zh: GroenLinks-PvdA、VVD 在选举辩论中就中端市场租金发生冲突
description: Candidates from GroenLinks-PvdA and VVD clashed on Thursday evening over regulations for mid-range rental housing.
description_zh: 周四晚间，绿色左翼-工党和自由民主联盟的候选人就中档出租房屋法规发生冲突。

title: Deceased woman in Wassenaar identified after 21 years thanks to Identify Me campaign
title_zh: 瓦瑟纳尔一名已故妇女的身份在“识别我”运动的帮助下在 21 年后得以确认
description: After over 21 years, the police have managed to identify a woman found dead in the dunes near Wassenaar on 4 July 2004, thanks to information received through the Identify Me campaign.
description_zh: 经过 21 年多的时间，警方终于通过“识别我”活动获得的信息，确认了 2004 年 7 月 4 日在瓦瑟纳尔附近沙丘中发现的一名女性尸体的身份。

title: Wassenaar murder victim is finally identified after 21 years
title_zh: 瓦瑟纳尔谋杀案受害者身份历经21年终于确定
description: A woman found dead in the dunes behind Wassenaar some 21 years ago has been identified as missing German woman...
description_zh: 大约 21 年前在瓦瑟纳尔后面的沙丘中发现的一名女性尸体已被确认为失踪的德国女性......

title: Cloudy, mild weekend with a cooler, sunnier week ahead
title_zh: 周末阴天，气候温和，未来一周天气凉爽，阳光充足
description: The sun will be hidden behind clouds most of the weekend, with occasional drizzle, according to weather bureau Weeronline. Temperatures...
description_zh: 据气象局Weeronline预报，周末大部分时间太阳将被云层遮挡，偶尔会有毛毛雨。气温……

title: Oranje beat Malta 4-0 but fail to impress in World Cup qualifier
title_zh: 橙衣军团4-0击败马耳他，但在世界杯预选赛中表现不佳
description: The Netherlands comfortably beat Malta 4-0 in their World Cup qualifier on Thursday evening but commentators said it was not...
description_zh: 周四晚上，荷兰队在世界杯预选赛中以 4-0 轻松击败马耳他队，但评论员表示这并不......

title: Police abandoning many more cases due to capacity issues; 45,000 dropped last year
title_zh: 由于能力问题，警方放弃了更多案件；去年减少了 45,000 起
description: The police are increasingly abandoning cases because they lack the time and personnel to conduct investigations.
description_zh: 由于缺乏时间和人力进行调查，警方越来越多地放弃案件。

title: BBB, PVV criticism of Council of State “quite disturbing” and "not good for democracy”
title_zh: BBB和PVV批评国务委员会“令人不安”且“不利于民主”
description: Council of State vice president Thom de Graaf is concerned by politicians publicly criticizing his advisory body.
description_zh: 国务委员会副主席汤姆·德格拉夫对政客公开批评他的咨询机构感到担忧。

title: Police dropping more criminal cases due to staff shortages
title_zh: 由于人手短缺，警方放弃了更多刑事案件
description: Dutch police are shelving more criminal investigations because of a lack of time and personnel, according to figures obtained by...
description_zh: 根据获得的数据显示，由于缺乏时间和人力，荷兰警方正在搁置更多刑事调查......

title: Fewer international students will Dutch economy €5 billion, universities say
title_zh: 荷兰大学称国际学生减少将给经济造成 50 亿欧元损失
description: A curb on the number of international students at five universities in the Randstad will have negative consequences for the Dutch economy.
description_zh: 限制兰斯塔德五所大学的国际学生人数将对荷兰经济产生负面影响。

title: Laser show to be held at the Binnenhof in The Hague this New Year’s Eve
title_zh: 今年除夕夜，海牙内庭将举办激光表演
description: For this year’s New Year’s Eve, a light and laser show will once again take place at the Hofvijver in the center of The Hague.
description_zh: 今年除夕夜，海牙市中心的 Hofvijver 将再次举办灯光和激光表演。

title: Survey shows majority think the risk of a national emergency has increased
title_zh: 调查显示，大多数人认为国家紧急状态的风险有所增加
description: Roughly 60 percent of people in the Netherlands think the risk of an emergency affecting large portions of the Netherlands has increased this past year.
description_zh: 大约 60% 的荷兰人认为，过去一年，影响荷兰大部分地区的紧急情况的风险有所增加。

title: Netherlands cruise past Malta 4–0 in World Cup qualifier despite uninspiring display
title_zh: 尽管表现平平，荷兰队在世界杯预选赛中仍以 4-0 击败马耳他
description: Oranje picked up a comfortable victory away to Malta on Thursday evening in a qualification match for the World Cup in 2026.
description_zh: 周四晚上，荷兰队在 2026 年世界杯预选赛中客场轻松战胜马耳他队。

title: Infrastructure agency increasingly facing angry locals, threats over road works detours
title_zh: 基础设施机构日益面临愤怒的当地人和因道路施工绕行而受到的威胁
description: The Dutch infrastructure agency Rijkswaterstaat is increasingly facing anger from residents as roadworks and bridge closures disrupt daily life in places like the Urmond village,
description_zh: 荷兰基础设施机构 Rijkswaterstaat 正面临居民越来越多的愤怒，因为道路施工和桥梁封闭扰乱了 Urmond 村等地的日常生活。

title: Pulling the transgender law was a mistake, NSC politician says
title_zh: 国家安全委员会政客称撤销跨性别法是一个错误
description: NSC MP Willem Koops acknowledged on Tuesday, during an election debate hosted by LGBTQ+ group COC, that
description_zh: 国家安全委员会议员 Willem Koops 周二在 LGBTQ+ 团体 COC 主办的选举辩论中承认，

title: Former VVD senator: Antifa terror motion was the "final straw" for leaving the party
title_zh: 前自民党参议员：反法西斯恐怖运动是脱党的“最后一根稻草”
description: The “final straw” that led Cees van de Sanden to leave theVVD Senate factionwas the
description_zh: 导致塞斯·范德桑登离开自民党参议院派系的“最后一根稻草”是

title: Heerlen man, 40, named as suspect in murder of his 62-year-old
title_zh: 一名 40 岁海尔伦男子被指控谋杀其 62 岁妻子
description: The 40-year-old man arrested in connection with the deathof a 62-year-old womanin Heerlen, Lim
description_zh: 这名 40 岁男子因涉嫌杀害一名 62 岁女子而被捕，Lim

title: Five people barred from voting in the Netherlands; Down from 25 in 2019
title_zh: 荷兰有五人被禁止投票；较 2019 年的 25 人有所下降
description: There are five people in the Netherlands who have had their right to vote revoked by a court, according to the Ministry of the Interior.
description_zh: 据荷兰内政部称，荷兰有五人的投票权被法院剥夺。

title: Video: Thousands of starfish wash ashore on Dutch beaches after weekend storm
title_zh: 视频：周末风暴过后，数千只海星被冲上荷兰海滩
description: Thousands of starfish have washed-up along several Dutch beaches followingstormy weather
description_zh: 暴风雨天气导致数以千计的海星被冲上荷兰的几处海滩

title: Cops break down door searching for abducted woman in Hoofddorp; Woman killed in Zaandam
title_zh: 警方破门搜寻霍夫多普被绑架的女子；赞丹一名女子被杀
description: The police used a battering ram to break down the front door of a home in Hoofddorp, searching for a 49-year-old woman who they believe
description_zh: 警方用攻城锤砸开霍夫多普一户人家的前门，搜寻一名他们认为是

title: Three suspects face life in prison after appeal hearing in Peter R. de Vries murder case
title_zh: 彼得·德弗里斯谋杀案上诉审理后，三名嫌疑人面临终身监禁
description: The Public Prosecution Service (OM) recommended life sentences on appeal for three men accused of involvement in the
description_zh: 检察院 (OM) 建议对三名涉嫌参与

title: Italian could face 3 years in prison for raping woman on Amsterdam on during King's Day
title_zh: 意大利男子因国王节期间在阿姆斯特丹强奸一名女子，可能面临 3 年监禁
description: The Public Prosecution Service (OM) recommended three years in prison against 27-year-old Sirio S.
description_zh: 检察机关 (OM) 建议对 27 岁的 Sirio S 判处三年监禁。

title: Dutch billionaires grow richer, widening wealth gap
title_zh: 荷兰亿万富翁财富增长，贫富差距扩大
description: The wealth of the Netherlands’ richest citizens continues to rise sharply, even as ordinary Dutch workers pay "disproportionately" higher taxes, according to a new
description_zh: 一项新研究表明，尽管荷兰普通工人缴纳的税款“不成比例”，但荷兰最富有公民的财富仍在继续大幅增长

title: Dordrecht hospital dismisses two workers for viewing 1,100 patient files illegally
title_zh: 多德雷赫特医院解雇两名员工，原因是他们非法查看了 1100 份患者档案
description: The Albert Schweitzer Hospital has fired two employees for looking into patients’ files out of curiosity.
description_zh: 阿尔伯特·史怀哲医院解雇了两名员工，原因是他们出于好奇查看了病人的档案。

title: Woman, 49, abducted while driving to work from Hoofddorp
title_zh: 一名 49 岁女子从霍夫多普开车上班途中遭绑架
description: Authorities have launched a large-scale investigation into the abduction of a 49-year-old woman from Hoofddorp, who disappeared on Wednesday morning while driving to work in Beverwijk.
description_zh: 当局已对一名来自霍夫多普的 49 岁女子被绑架的案件展开大规模调查，该女子于周三早上开车前往贝弗韦克上班途中失踪。

title: Half a million bees killed in fire suspected as arson at Almere park
title_zh: 阿尔梅勒公园发生火灾，50万只蜜蜂死亡，疑似人为纵火
description: A fire in Beatrixpark in Almere has destroyed ten beehives and killed around half a million bees, in what police say was likely arson.
description_zh: 阿尔梅勒贝娅特丽克斯公园发生火灾，烧毁了 10 个蜂箱，造成约 50 万只蜜蜂死亡，警方称这很可能是人为纵火。

title: Ben & Jerry's co-founder says Unilever is "muzzling" them; Wants ice cream brand back
title_zh: Ben & Jerry's 联合创始人称联合利华正在“封杀”他们；希望收回冰淇淋品牌
description: Ben & Jerry’s co-founder Ben Cohen wants to buy the ice cream company back from Unilever.
description_zh: Ben & Jerry 的联合创始人本·科恩 (Ben Cohen) 希望从联合利华手中买回这家冰淇淋公司。

title: Increased supply slowed down home price development in Q3; Prices up 4.8% year-on-year
title_zh: 供应增加导致第三季度房价上涨放缓；价格同比上涨 4.8%
description: The supply of homes in the Dutch housing market was higher in the third quarter, thanks largely to landlords selling off rental properties that have become less profitable to let out.
description_zh: 荷兰房地产市场的房屋供应量在第三季度有所增加，这主要归功于房东出售出租利润较低的出租房产。

title: More homes for sale as landlords quit, prices drop in Amsterdam
title_zh: 房东辞职导致阿姆斯特丹房屋出售增多，房价下跌
description: Some 46,000 houses and apartments came onto the market between July and September – the highest number since 2008 –...
description_zh: 7 月至 9 月期间，约有 46,000 套房屋和公寓进入市场，这是自 2008 年以来的最高数量……

title: NAM agrees to pay quake victims’ emotional stress claims
title_zh: NAM 同意支付地震灾民的精神压力索赔
description: More than 5,000 people in Groningen will receive compensation from oil and gas company NAM for emotional distress caused by...
description_zh: 格罗宁根的 5,000 多名居民将获得石油和天然气公司 NAM 的赔偿，以补偿因火灾造成的精神痛苦......

title: Some 6% of women in the Netherlands have no income of their own
title_zh: 荷兰约有 6% 的女性没有自己的收入
description: The share of women in the Netherlands without their own income from work or benefits has fallen sharply over the...
description_zh: 荷兰没有工作收入或福利的女性比例在过去一年里急剧下降......

title: PVV decidedly the biggest party 3 weeks before election; Some gains for D66, JA21
title_zh: 选举前三周，自由党 (PVV) 稳坐第一大党地位；D66 和 JA21 有所进步
description: Three weeks before the parliamentary election on October 29, the far-right PVV is decidedly the biggest party in the polls.
description_zh: 距离10月29日议会选举还有三周时间，极右翼自由党在民意调查中毫无疑问是最大的政党。

title: Dutch foundation takes mass claim against Airbnb to Supreme Court
title_zh: 荷兰基金会向最高法院起诉 Airbnb
description: A Dutch foundation seeking millions of euros in compensation from Airbnb is taking the matter to the Supreme Court.
description_zh: 荷兰一家基金会向 Airbnb 索赔数百万欧元，并将此事提交最高法院。

title: US Senate confirms Joe Popolo as new ambassador to NL
title_zh: 美国参议院批准乔·波波洛为新任驻荷兰大使
description: The United States Senate has approved Joe Popolo as the new US ambassador to the Netherlands. He will formally take...
description_zh: 美国参议院已批准乔·波波洛出任新任美国驻荷兰大使。他将正式就任……
